---
title: "Curriculum Vitae"
title-block: false
---

# Curriculum Vitae

::: {.page-intro}
A current copy of my CV is available below. The PDF download is the best option for mobile browsers and for sharing a direct copy.
:::

::: {.cv-actions}
[Download CV (PDF)](CV-Tommaso Crosta.pdf){.btn .btn-brand}
[Email](mailto:tommaso.crosta@phd.unibocconi.it){.btn .btn-ghost}
:::

::: {.note-panel .cv-note}
If the embedded viewer does not load in your browser, use the PDF download above.
:::

<div class="cv-frame-wrapper">
  <iframe src="CV-Tommaso Crosta.pdf" title="Curriculum Vitae of Tommaso Crosta" class="cv-frame"></iframe>
</div>
